rationale: Gov't Code §2001.051 governs contested-case hearing procedures. The proposed statutory amendment to Tax Code §11.13(b) adjusts a homestead exemption dollar amount and does not alter or implicate hearing rights or notice requirements.
quote:
In a contested case, each party is entitled to an opportunity:
(1) for hearing after reasonable notice of not less than 10 days; and
(2) to respond and to present evidence and argument on each issue involved in the case.
_note: No conflict identified; §2001.051 is a general APA provision unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
